query:
UPDATE sessions s
        SET expires_at = LEAST(
                NOW() + ($2 || ' days')::INTERVAL,
                s.created_at + ($3 || ' days')::INTERVAL
            ),
            last_used_at = NOW()
        FROM users u
        WHERE s.token_hash = $1
          AND s.expires_at > NOW()
          AND s.created_at + ($3 || ' days')::INTERVAL > NOW()
          AND u.id = s.user_id
        RETURNING s.user_id, u.customer_id
